headline: Jim Cramer Says the Market Is “Dead Wrong” About These 5 Oversold Stocks
summary: Jim Cramer named five blue-chip stocks the market punished after strong earnings, and he's betting that millions of investors and billions of dollars got it completely wrong.

headline: Wells Fargo CEO Says America Is Still Spending Big—Even With Inflation Concerns
summary: Wells Fargo & Company on Tuesday reported stronger-than-expected second-quarter results as higher fee income, investment banking activity and net interest income lifted revenue. The bank reported adjusted earnings of $1.96 per share, beating the Wall Street consensus estimate of $1.72....

The bank reported adjusted earnings of $1.96 per share, beating the Wall Street consensus estimate of $1.72....

headline: Truist Financial Earnings Beat Estimates but Eyes Are on Bank’s Next Chapter
summary: Truist Financial delivered strong second-quarter earnings Friday, but investors may be more focused on what the leadership transition to incoming CEO Michael Lyons could mean for the bank’s strategy.
